extortion.description: Yulkok Ltd. (South Korea) This is a major global player with the same name. Operations: Manufacturing high-precision parts and assemblies for the aerospace industry. Specialization: 5-axis CNC metal machining, fuselage component assembly. Partners: Collaborates with global giants such as Boeing and Airbus, as well as Korea Aerospace Industries (KAI) for the production of military aircraft (e.g., T-50, FA-50). Location: Headquartered in Changwon, South Korea; founded in 1990.
